'''Blaster Cannons''' were [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] vehicles used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and its successor, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Blaster Cannons were used during the [[Krantian Civil War|liberation]] of [[Krant]] some time after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. They were constructed at [[Fortress/Legends|Fortresses]] for a cost of 200 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] and 200 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]]. They were weakly-[[Armor/Legends|armored]] but had a powerful energy cannon, and when not in use folded down. Blaster Cannons had to deploy into a firing position to launch their attacks.

==Behind the scenes==
Blaster Cannons appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The campaign was later included in its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. An image of a Blaster Cannon was used to represent the "cannon" unit in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]''.
